title: Upon Umber.
content:
Umber was painting of a lion fierce,
    And, working it, by chance from Umber's erse
    Flew out a crack, so mighty, that the fart,
    As Umber states, did make his lion start.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon Umber."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
